# data.bs.ch

> Open Data portal of the Canton of Basel-Stadt. This file is the LLM entrypoint to discover datasets, understand query mechanics, and access generated dataset metadata pages optimized for machine use.

This portal is powered by the Huwise Explore API v2.1. For most tasks, start from the dataset index, then use the ODSQL guide and cookbook to build valid requests.

Important usage notes:

- Use the Explore API `catalog/datasets` endpoints for discovery and schema lookup.
- Use dataset `records` endpoints for filtered queries and aggregations.
- Respect API pagination and limits (`limit`, `offset`).
- Prefer concise, URL-encoded ODSQL expressions.
- All links in this file are absolute and intended for root-only `llms.txt` discovery.

## Getting Started

- [How to query data.bs.ch](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opendatabs/data.bs.ch_llms.txt/refs/heads/main/llms/getting-started.md): API base URL patterns, discovery flow, and first requests.

## Query Language (ODSQL)

- [ODSQL cheat sheet for data.bs.ch](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opendatabs/data.bs.ch_llms.txt/refs/heads/main/llms/odsql-cheatsheet.md): Practical clause guide, valid patterns, and common pitfalls.

## Examples

- [Query cookbook](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opendatabs/data.bs.ch_llms.txt/refs/heads/main/llms/query-cookbook.md): Ready-to-adapt query recipes for discovery, filtering, aggregation, and sorting.

## Dataset Catalog

- [Generated dataset index](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opendatabs/data.bs.ch_llms.txt/refs/heads/main/llms/datasets/index.md): Dataset IDs, titles, freshness, themes, and links.
- [Generated theme indexes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opendatabs/data.bs.ch_llms.txt/refs/heads/main/llms/datasets/by-theme/index.md): Dataset grouping by high-level domain/theme.

## Optional

- [Full dataset context bundle (generated)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opendatabs/data.bs.ch_llms.txt/refs/heads/main/llms/datasets/full/all.md): Contains all public dataset descriptions, full metadata (`metas`), and schema (`fields`) in one file.
- [Full dataset context index (generated)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opendatabs/data.bs.ch_llms.txt/refs/heads/main/llms/datasets/full/index.md): Links to per-dataset pages containing description, full metadata (`metas`), and schema (`fields`).
- [Explore API v2.1 reference + OpenAPI download entrypoint](https://help.opendatasoft.com/apis/ods-explore-v2/): Official docs page with "Download OpenAPI specification" action.
